arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti provides Kylian Mbappé injury update
arts.sum: Mateo Retegui will have nightmares about his miss from 3 yards ; Carlo Ancelotti will wake up in cold sweats about the fitness of his players ; Madridista fans would simply forgo Christmas this year, teleport to February using Einsteinian mathematics and get to February, when Los Blancos inevitably turn on the style. As for Ancelotti’s cold sweats, he will be worried about the fitness of a certain Kylian Mbappé, who went down in the second half and was taken off with a suspected thigh injury .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s position on Trent Alexander-Arnold as Liverpool continue contract talks
arts.sum: Despite reports of progress in England of a new contract in England, Real Madrid remain confident in the pull of the Spanish capital. Los Blancos are engaged in a battle for Trent Alexander-Arnold’s contract, with the Scouse right-back able to sign a contract with Real Madrid in three weeks’ time. Liverpool are engaged in talks […] The post Real Madrid’s position on Trent Alexander-Arnold as Liverpool continue contract talks appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Mourinho tells Real Madrid to sign a better Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: Now Mourinho has claimed that he is better than Lamine Yamal, the 17-year-old sensation who has taken Barcelona and world football by storm over the course of the last 18 months – and the Portuguese hopes he hooks up with Carlo Ancelotti’s Real Madrid ahead of Barca. Jose Mourinho has told his old club Real Madrid that they should move for a better version of Lamine Yamal .

arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Atalanta 2-3 Real Madrid; 2024 UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: Tchouameni—5.5: Looked like a midfielder playing center back when conceding the penalty—a needless foul inside the box. Rudiger—7: Crucial with his box defending, but nearly lost concentration in the final minute of the game, overcommitting on a cross and leaving Retegui with a free shot on goal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's stars score the goals, the grit gets them home
arts.sum: Tuesday's 3-2 win over Atalanta showed that Carlo Ancelotti is starting to find a balance between Real Madrid's star quality and grit.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Atalanta 2 - 3 Real Madrid Post-game, Champions League 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani, Jose Perez, and Siddharth Ramsundar discuss: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Club 'warming to idea' of cashing in on Real Madrid-linked star
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly willing to cash in on key defender Lisandro Martinez, if rumours that Real Madrid will bid for the player summer are true.

arts.ttl: Thibaut Courtois claims Real Madrid teammate could miss Rayo Vallecano clash through injury
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois has revealed his take that he and his teammates may be forced to make do without the contributions of Kylian Mbappé this weekend. Frontman Mbappé…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid injury news: Kylian Mbappe limps off in Atalanta win with suspected hamstring issue, update provided by club
arts.sum: Real Madrid forward Kylian is reportedly unscathed after being forced off with injury in the first half of their 3-2 win over Atalanta in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Lookman: ‘Atalanta showed we can compete’ with Real Madrid
arts.sum: Ademola Lookman was named Man of the Match after Atalanta’s 3-2 defeat to Real Madrid...
